title: Omni-Evo: Aliens (Alienevo Addon)
description: Adds Rath and Goop to Alienevo.
body:
Adds Rath and Goop into Alienevo. This addon is meant to be paired with [Omnitrix Evolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/omni-evo) but it works fine without it. You can find their alien DNA in structures. Right click the DNA item (Appoplexian fur or Polymorph goo respectfully) to gain the alien as a transformation.

### Rath Moveset:
- Claws Extend: Extend your claws to do more damage.
- "LET ME TELL YOU SOMETHING": You scream causing a sonic wave that damages enities.
- Lewodan Elbow Drop: While in the air, you do a elbow drop causing a explosion on impact on the ground.
- Surface Climbing: You can climb up walls.
- Antarian Arm Bar: You charge fowards causing damage to anything you hit. (Make hunger drain faster)
- Hold Breathe: Breath underwater and in space for 5 minutes.

### Goop Moveset:
- Puddle Form: Go into the puddle onto the floor to move faster and gain a smaller hitbox.
- Trap Grab: Trap entities by surrounding them in Goop, suffocating them.
- Throw Goop: Throw goop from your body at eneimes causing damage to them.
- Gliding: You can glide in the air.
- Anti-Gravity Projector Flight: You can fly in the air using your anti-gravity projector.

# **Rath's structure:**
![Rath's structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a685f6a2af59e52ea331083aed238ea89e49521.png)

# **Goop's structure:**
![Goop's structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eaba0d9514dcf5326f79db9000e4192515ad22d.png)
